billing.description: Duplicate charge — routes to Billing branch
billing.curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/support-inquiry \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-Webhook-Token: demo_webhook_token_change_me' \
  -d '{"customer_name":"Jane Smith","customer_email":"jane.smith@example.com","subject":"Duplicate charge","message":"I was charged twice for my Pro plan this month. Invoice IDs INV-2025-0612 and INV-2025-0614. Please refund the duplicate."}'

technical.description: API 401 error — routes to Technical AI Agent + RAG
technical.curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/support-inquiry \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-Webhook-Token: demo_webhook_token_change_me' \
  -d '{"customer_name":"Alex Chen","customer_email":"alex.chen@devcorp.io","subject":"API 401 Unauthorized","message":"Every API call returns 401 invalid_api_key. We use Bearer auth with sk_live_ prefix. Help troubleshoot?"}'

feature_request.description: Slack integration — routes to Feature Request branch
feature_request.curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/support-inquiry \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'X-Webhook-Token: demo_webhook_token_change_me' \
  -d '{"customer_name":"Morgan Lee","customer_email":"morgan@startup.co","subject":"Slack integration","message":"Can you add native Slack integration for deployment notifications? Is it on your roadmap?"}'
